workspace.title: Offline QR check-in
workspace.description: Authorize this device, download an encrypted roster, and keep recording arrivals when connectivity drops.
workspace.load_error_description: The secure device workspace could not be loaded. Manual name check-in remains available.
workspace.privacy_body: QR credentials contain no member name, email or phone number. The roster and queue are encrypted on this device and are removed on logout, revocation or expiry.
workspace.no_wallet: Attendance never changes balances or awards time credits.
workspace.manual_required: Manual name and code entry remains available at all times.
workspace.offline_ready: This device is ready for offline check-in.
workspace.offline_not_ready: Authorize this browser before relying on offline check-in.
workspace.purged: The encrypted offline roster and queue were removed from this device.

device.title: Authorized staff devices
device.description: Each device is assigned to one staff member and one event. Secrets are shown once.
device.label: Device label
device.label_hint: Use a recognizable name such as Front desk tablet.
device.one_shot_body: It will be encrypted on this browser when you download the roster. It cannot be shown again.
device.rotate_description: The existing device secret will stop working immediately. Sync or remove any pending actions first.
device.unsynced_rotate_blocked: Sync or remove pending actions before rotating this device secret.
device.lost_description: The device will be blocked immediately. Any encrypted local roster must be purged when it next connects.
device.reason_required: Enter a reason for revoking the device.
device.revoke_success: Device revoked. Local offline data must be removed.
device.empty: No staff devices have been authorized for this event.

scan.title: Scan or enter attendee code
scan.description: Signed codes are checked on this device before they enter the encrypted queue.
scan.camera_unavailable: Camera scanning is unavailable. Enter the code manually.
scan.reason_hint: A reason is required for undo. Do not include sensitive information.
scan.queued: {{name}} was added to the encrypted queue.
scan.invalid: This code is invalid, copied, rotated, revoked, expired or belongs to another event.
scan.transition_invalid: That action does not follow the attendee's current offline state.
scan.reason_required: Enter a reason before queuing an undo.
scan.verification_unavailable: This browser cannot verify signed QR codes. Use manual name check-in.

queue.title: Encrypted offline queue
queue.description: Retries keep the same idempotency key. Only the server can finalize attendance.
queue.sync_error: The queue could not be synced. It remains encrypted for a safe retry.
queue.sync_success: The latest server decisions have been applied.
queue.empty: No attendance actions are stored on this device.
queue.purge_description: The encrypted roster, device secret and any unsynced actions will be permanently removed from this browser.

conflicts.title: Check-in conflicts
conflicts.description: Review stale or contradictory offline actions against the current attendance record.
conflicts.reason_hint: Record a concise operational reason without sensitive information.
conflicts.reason_required: Enter a reason before resolving this conflict.
conflicts.resolved: The conflict resolution was recorded in the audit ledger.
conflicts.resolution_error: The attendance record changed again. Refresh and review the conflict.

manual.title: Manual name fallback
manual.description: Search the live roster by name whenever a QR code or device is unavailable.
manual.code_description: Staff can always type or paste the signed attendee code; camera access is never required.

credential.title: Your event check-in code
credential.description: This signed code identifies only this registration and event. It contains no name, email or phone number.
credential.load_error: Your check-in code status could not be loaded.
credential.one_shot: For security, the code is shown only when it is created or rotated.
credential.rotate_description: The current code will stop working immediately. Any saved or printed copy will be rejected.
credential.revoke_description: The code will stop working immediately. You can create a new code later while your registration remains confirmed.
credential.reason_required: Enter a reason before revoking the code.
credential.unavailable: A check-in code could not be created. Confirm that your registration is still active.
credential.privacy: The QR payload is PII-free. Event staff use their encrypted roster to match it to your registration.

errors.forbidden: You no longer have permission to use this event device.
errors.device_expired: This device authorization expired. Its offline data has been removed.
errors.device_revoked: This device was revoked. Its offline data has been removed.
errors.manifest_expired: The encrypted roster expired and was removed. Download a fresh roster while online.
errors.generic: That offline check-in action could not be completed.
